name: @cordfuse/nux-qr-tool
description: NUX MightyAmp QR preset encoder — generates decorated QR PNG cards from preset JSON

scripts.build: bun build src/qr-generator.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f='dist/qr-generator.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))"

author: Steve Krisjanovs
